name: Italy Unemployment Rate (15-74)
notes: ISTAT dataflow 151_874 (DCCV_TAXDISOCCUMENS1) — monthly unemployment rate aged 15-74. EDITION vintage resolved to latest at fetch time. Verified live 2026-05-28 (~6%).

name: Italy Industrial Production Index (Total ex-construction)
notes: ISTAT dataflow 115_333 (DCSC_INDXPRODIND_1 base 2021) — total industry excluding construction (B-E) seasonally+calendar adjusted. No EDITION dimension. Verified live 2026-05-28 (94.4 @ 2026-03).

name: Italy GDP Growth (Chain-Linked QoQ)
notes: ISTAT dataflow 163_156 (DCCN_SQCQ) — quarterly GDP (B1GQ) chain-linked %-change; G1 valuation interpreted as quarter-on-quarter from live values. EDITION vintage resolved to latest at fetch time. Verified live 2026-05-28 (0.165 @ 2026-Q1). Semantics inferred from API; verify against ISTAT release before downstream cycle use.
